historical_validation.verdict: Verified First Entry in category: Security-Native Programming Language

technical_differentiation.vs_reliability_languages: Memory safety (Rust/Ada) prevents accidental bugs; ZelC prevents deliberate adversarial attacks.
technical_differentiation.vs_functional_languages: Haskell IO Monads separate side-effects; ZelC Kinetic Safety separates reversible observations from irreversible consequences.
technical_differentiation.vs_security_tools: Zeek/YARA are passive sensors or scripting layers; ZelC is a unified, compiled execution runtime with native containment primitives.
